Home / Media Streaming / Navidrome

Navidrome — open source alternative

Self-hosted Spotify alternative — your music, your server.

Strengths

  • Single binary, minimal resource use.
  • Subsonic-compatible — tons of third-party apps.
  • Nice modern web UI.

Weaknesses

  • No native streaming recommendations.
  • You supply your own music library.
  • No podcast support by default.
License: GPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, LinuxMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Navidrome is used as an alternative to

Spotify

Music streaming and podcasts.
